reason: The happy path is correct, but three reproducible fail-open paths can contaminate eligibility or audio weighting. The lane also reports PARTIAL because its mandatory wide-suite gate is unmet.

blocking_findings.finding: The CLI slot determines the family. Artifact type, source, world frame and upstream BALL-track provenance are not validated. A bound exotic or pb.vision-derived candidates JSON is stamped as ball_velocity_kink.
blocking_findings.reproduction: An artifact declaring artifact_type=exotic_audio_disguised_as_ball, source=pbvision_teacher_predictions and family=AuDiO_OnSeT produced an exact ball_velocity_kink agreement.
required_fix: Require ball artifacts to be schema-v1 racketsport_ball_inflections with source=ball_track_image_motion and world_frame=image_xy.
Validate and record ball_track_source SHA/path, pts_source SHA/media identity and candidate-level image-space provenance.
Require the real audio-v2 contract: artifact_type=racketsport_audio_onsets, detector_version=audio_onset_pop_v2 and source=video_audio_pop_v2.
Add rejection tests for exotic, pb.vision, audio-disguised-as-ball and case-variant artifacts.

blocking_findings.finding: Matches are keyed by stringified event_id, but event IDs are not required to be unique. One genuine kink can therefore be reused by multiple rows.
blocking_findings.reproduction: DUP@1s and DUP@8s with one kink at 1s caused both event lookups to receive the same zero-delta kink match.
required_fix: Require nonempty string event IDs unique within each video before matching.
Reject string-coercion collisions such as 1 versus "1".
Key matching by an internal unique event index and recheck the emitted cue-to-current-event delta.
Add duplicate-ID and distant-alias regression tests.

blocking_findings.finding: The circular null trusts duration_s so long as it exceeds the last PTS. Hash binding authenticates the bytes, not the truthfulness of that duration.
blocking_findings.reproduction: Identical dense events/onsets failed with duration=10s because observed=1.0 and null_max=1.0, but passed after only declaring duration=1000s because observed=1.0 and null_max=0.0.
required_fix: Derive the circular period from verified frame PTS plus a validated terminal-frame duration, or tightly reject duration inconsistent with that interval.
Require the racketsport_frame_times artifact type, frame_count and media declaration.

blocking_findings.finding: A frame-times artifact may omit source_video_sha256/media_sha256 and still pass. This directly violates the documented hard-refusal contract.
required_fix: Require the declaration to be present and equal to the staged media SHA.
Record declared_media_sha256 separately from the inferred staged-media value.

eligibility.happy_path: Audio-only, zero-agreement, case variants and exotic families cannot bypass the final has_physical_cue check when inputs are semantically honest.
loopholes: Artifact-family spoofing manufactures the required family.
Duplicate event IDs reuse another row's kink match.
eligibility.real_pulled_manifest: Clean: 2192 of 2192 video/event IDs are unique.

correct_behaviors: Modulo wrap relative to the PTS origin
Twenty deterministic offsets with absolute offset at least 1 second on actual-length clips
Dense approximately 29 Hz onsets tie the null and fail
remaining_risks: Duration inflation can force a pass.
A single exact onset/event passes 1.0 > 0.0. This follows the current formula but exposes missing minimum-support doctrine.
Videos barely longer than 2 seconds can produce repeated offsets, reducing the effective null below K=20.
audio_weight_null.required_ruling: Before inspecting rebuilt results, preregister a minimum observed-match support or explicitly accept singleton behavior. Also require 20 unique offsets or fail closed.

c_placebo.evidence: The C construction itself was unchanged. On the recovered pair, all 1481 rows matched; filtering to the corrected 1189 kink-backed rows produced zero pixel-window, class, weight, exact-mask, agreement or rally-bound mismatches. C's recorded B SHA exactly matched arm_b_manifest.json.
c_placebo.hardening: scripts/racketsport/build_abc_arm_manifests.py:806-812 compares only the count of valid frames. Require exact mask equality and normalized equality of every non-placebo field.

positive_evidence: Recovered B/C and standalone consumed-input ledgers are identical.
All 12 recovered audio/kink dependency bindings recompute exactly.
Teacher SHA and C-to-B SHA recompute exactly.
The synthetic determinism test compares all five emitted artifacts byte-for-byte.
fail_closed_gaps: Missing frame-times media identity is accepted.
Semantic artifact provenance is not authenticated.
Outputs are written sequentially into an existing directory. A failed rebuild can leave stale invalid B/C files beside a new VM_ABC_NEEDS.json.
determinism_and_sha.required_fix: Publish into a fresh staging directory atomically, or require an empty output directory and write a completion manifest last. The immediate VM rebuild must use a new empty ABC_OUT.

recount_1189.assessment: The test reads the real pinned file and independently applies the new family rule; it is not calling production eligibility logic.
recount_1189.gap: The evidence file is ignored/untracked and tests/racketsport/test_abc_arm_manifests.py:612-613 silently skips when absent.
recount_1189.required_fix: Make missing pinned evidence a preflight failure and assert the 773/416 split plus zero kink-bearing rejected rows.

cli_contract.evidence: Parser flags/defaults are unchanged and VM_ABC_NEEDS.json has all four explicit paths for all six clips.
cli_contract.limitation: The raw VM frame/audio/kink artifacts were not pulled, so their new duration and semantic-input checks cannot be verified locally.

wide_suite.attribution: Thirty failures reproduced with both owned files byte-identical to HEAD. The remaining court-training test timed out at 540 seconds in the candidate-wide run but passed against HEAD in 98.936 seconds.
wide_suite.causal_assessment: No credible import, state or execution path connects either ABC file to that court-training test. It is probably transient, but selected-node reproduction does not satisfy the lane's explicit every-failure-proven-pre-existing requirement.
wide_suite.required_fix: After code fixes, rerun the focused suite and full candidate suite. If the timeout returns, run a matched full-suite HEAD-owned baseline in the same dirty workspace and ordering.

rereview_gate: Fix all three critical fail-open paths and the frame-times identity omission.
Strengthen exact C parity and atomic output publication.
Make the real recount non-skippable for experiment preflight.
Preregister the singleton/minimum-support null policy before viewing rebuilt null results.
Run focused adversarial tests plus the mandatory wide-suite attribution check.
Only then rebuild into a fresh empty VM output directory; do not train from the existing abc_out.
